svg.text: GCP migration target · us-east1 (primary) · europe-west3 (prod-eu) · australia-southeast1 (prod-au)
n2-standard-4 · 3–25 nodes · Release channel: Regular · Workload Identity Federation · Autopilot node groups
HxPR Namespace — GCP SDK: GCS + Pub/Sub
Same API surface as AWS OpenSearch
All buckets: CMEK · Uniform bucket-level access
All topics: CMEK via Cloud KMS
Cloud KMS: key rings (replaces KMS CMKs)
CMEK for GCS, Pub/Sub, Disk volumes
Secret Manager: replaces SSM Param Store
MongoDB conn string · API keys · env config
GKE SA → GCP SA → IAM roles
All services encrypted at-rest (CMEK) · TLS in-transit · Workload Identity Federation replaces IRSA
